data.title: Silver market manipulation concerns emerge amid amid high volatility
data.description:
The silver market is currently in turmoil due to alleged widespread market manipulation stemming from a disconnect between physical and paper trading prices.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/silver-market-manipulation-concerns-emerge/

data.title:
Binance announced that they will be converting their $1B SAFU stablecoin fund into $BTC over the next 30 days.

Additionally, if in the future the value of that bitcoin falls below $800M, they will buy more to bring the balance back up to $1B.

data.title: No Humans Allowed: Moltbook is a New Social Platform Exclusive for AI Bots
data.description:
Octane AI CEO Matt Schlicht launched a network where over 37,000 autonomous agents debate topics like singularity while humans watch from the sidelines. The post No Humans Allowed: Moltbook is a New Social Platform Exclusive for AI Bots first appeared on The Shib Daily.
source: https://news.shib.io/2026/01/31/no-humans-allowed-moltbook-is-a-new-social-platform-exclusive-for-ai-bots/

data.title: Bitdeer Reports Bitcoin Holdings Update
data.description: Bitdeer, a Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company, has released its latest Bitcoin holdings data on the X platform. According to ChainCatcher, the company produced 156 BTC this week while selling 152 BTC, resulting in a net increase of 4 BTC in its holdings. As of now, Bitdeer's total Bitcoin holdings have reached approximately 1,508.4 BTC.

data.title: He Yi posted a photo with OKX Star and claimed that she had discussed "poaching" talent, but made no mention of the "1011 incident".
data.description: He Yi posted a photo with OKX Star on the X platform and wrote: "I believe that for a company to succeed, it's not about attacking others, but about optimizing its own weaknesses. In December, I discussed poaching with him at the F1 racetrack, and he told me to poach anyone I wanted. Furthermore, Mr. Xu didn't ask me about 1011 at all, but recently he's been very enthusiastic about sharing his views on Binance, making more people aware of Binance, which might also be a manifestation of his enthusiasm." Previous reports indicated that He Yi claimed to have poached a product manager from OKX.

data.title: Gold Investment Strategy Yields Significant Profits for Major Buyer
data.description: The world's largest private buyer of gold has reportedly achieved an average profit of $90 million per individual. According to NS3.AI, this investor employs a strategic approach by selling dollars and accumulating gold, demonstrating a keen awareness of the risks involved. The strategy reflects a cautious stance on currency exposure, favoring tangible assets such as gold.

data.title: Bitdeer sold 152 BTC this week, bringing its total Bitcoin holdings to approximately 1,508.4 BTC.
data.description: Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company Bitdeer released its latest Bitcoin holdings data on the X platform. This week, its Bitcoin mining output was 156 BTC, but it sold 152 BTC during the same period, resulting in a net increase of 4 BTC in its Bitcoin holdings. As of January 30, its Bitcoin holdings reached approximately 1,508.4 BTC.

data.title: Lighter Expands Capabilities with Ethereum Virtual Machine Compatibility
data.description: Lighter has launched Lighter EVM, enhancing its platform with Ethereum Virtual Machine compatibility. According to NS3.AI, this development allows developers to deploy general-purpose smart contracts directly on Lighter. This marks a significant transition from its initial role as a high-performance trading engine, aiming to expand its functionalities and appeal to a broader developer community.

data.title: Planet Midday News
data.description: 1. OKX Star: The $10.11 liquidation of hundreds of billions of dollars was caused by Binance's irresponsible USDe wealth management activities; 2. He Yi comments on OKX order placement issues: OKX's overall product capabilities are good, so Binance poached the product manager; 3. A trader trading MOLT made a 563-fold profit in 2 days, turning $2,021 into $1.14 million; 4. 0xSun's linked wallet deposited $2 million into Hyperliquid to go long on silver with 4x leverage; 5. A victim lost 4,556 ETH, worth $12.25 million, due to accidentally copying a corrupted transaction record address; 6. Arthur Hayes: Warsh's appointment as Fed Chairman will not stop "money printing," and pullbacks are still buying opportunities; 7. The US Solana spot ETF saw a net outflow of $11.24 million in a single day; 8. Trump announced the nomination of Brett Matsumoto as the new director of the Bureau of Labor Statistics.

data.title: The US Solana spot ETF saw a net outflow of $11.24 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, the Solana spot ETF saw a net outflow of $11.24 million yesterday (January 30th, Eastern Time). The Bitwise SOL ETF (BSOL) experienced a net outflow of $10.12 million yesterday (January 30th, Eastern Time), with a current historical net inflow of $678 million. The Grayscale SOL ETF (GSOL) saw a net outflow of $2.15 million yesterday, with a current historical net inflow of $114 million. As of press time, the Solana spot ETF has a total net asset value of $992 million, a net asset value ratio of 1.50%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $871 million.

data.title: Solana Spot ETF Experiences Significant Net Outflow
data.description:
On January 31, Solana spot ETFs saw a substantial net outflow, according to PANews. Data from SoSoValue indicates that on January 30, Eastern Time, the total net outflow for Solana spot ETFs reached $11.24 million.

The Bitwise SOL ETF BSOL recorded a single-day net outflow of $10.12 million, with a historical total net inflow of $678 million. Meanwhile, the Grayscale SOL ETF GSOL experienced a net outflow of $2.15 million, contributing to a historical total net inflow of $114 million.

As of the time of reporting, the total net asset value of Solana spot ETFs stands at $992 million, with a Solana net asset ratio of 1.50%. The cumulative historical net inflow has reached $871 million.

data.title: 400 XAUTs were transferred from a Bitfinex hot wallet to Gate, bringing the total amount transferred to Gate to over $6.8 million in a short period.
data.description: According to on-chain monitoring data, on January 31, a Bitfinex-marked hot wallet address (0x7713…35EC) transferred 400 XAUT tokens to a Gate user's deposit address (0x8e9E…73eB), equivalent to approximately $1.9664 million in market value. On-chain data shows that in the past two days, this Gate deposit address has repeatedly received XAUT from the same Bitfinex hot wallet, with individual transactions ranging from 400 to 1000 tokens. These assets were subsequently quickly transferred to the Gate hot wallet. Following a cumulative transfer of approximately $22.951 million on January 30, over $6.8 million worth of XAUT has been transferred to Gate. From a market perspective, with the increased trading activity of real-world asset-backed products such as gold tokens, Gate's trading volume and liquidity in related categories continue to expand. According to CoinGlass data, Gate XAUT (gold) spot trading volume remains among the top in the industry, and the platform's market influence in gold-related digital asset trading and liquidity support continues to increase.

data.title: 0xSun's linked wallet deposited $2 million into Hyperliquid to go long on silver with 4x leverage.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a wallet (0x856f...bFA6) associated with Chinese-speaking KOL 0xSun deposited $2 million USDC into Hyperliquid and opened a long position in silver with 4x leverage.

data.title: Cardano Wallets Accumulate Significant ADA Holdings
data.description: Santiment posted on X that Cardano wallets holding between 100,000 and 100 million ADA have collectively added over 454.7 million ADA in the past two months. This accumulation by large holders, often referred to as 'whales,' indicates a growing interest and confidence in the Cardano network. The increase in ADA holdings by these wallets could potentially influence the market dynamics and price movements of the cryptocurrency. Observers are keenly watching how this trend might impact Cardano's future developments and its position in the broader crypto market.

data.title: Polymarket ICO Predictions Show Overestimated Success Rate
data.description: PANews posted on X (formerly Twitter). Polymarket's initial coin offering (ICO) predictions have been perceived as highly accurate. However, a retrospective analysis of key moments when outcomes were still uncertain reveals a different picture. Data from 231 prediction markets and nearly $250 million in trading volume indicate that the actual success rate is approximately 66%. Furthermore, the errors consistently lean towards an overly optimistic outlook.

data.title: He Yi commented on OKX's order placement issues: OKX's overall product capabilities are good, which is why Binance poached its product manager.
data.description: Some community users claimed that Binance's API had never had any issues with order placement, while OKX made it virtually impossible to place orders successfully during extreme market conditions. In response, He Yi posted on the OKX platform, "Need me to tag Xu Mingxing for you? He's working hard to promote Binance. I think their product capabilities are quite good, so I poached his product manager." Previously, OKX CEO Star publicly stated that the October 11th crypto flash crash was caused by Binance's irresponsible USDe wealth management activities.

data.title: A trader on MOLT made a profit of 563 times in two days, turning $2,021 into $1.14 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a trader (0x7805...3353) turned $2,021 into $1.14 million in just two days. This trader spent 0.68 TEH (approximately $2,021) to buy 1.24 billion MOLT, which are now worth $1.14 million, representing a return of 563 times.
